action_set_definitions.name: get_global_system_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current audit overview, including the total discrepancy count across all batches and the global resolution status.

action_set_definitions.name: list_batches
action_set_definitions.description: Returns a list of batch summaries, optionally filtered by precinct identifier.

precinct_id.description: The precinct number to filter by (e.g., '89').

action_set_definitions.name: get_batch_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves comprehensive information for a specific batch, including damage type, physical vs. electronic counts, and current processing stage.

batch_id.description: The unique identifier for the ballot batch.

action_set_definitions.name: lookup_forensic_protocol
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the official forensic protocol code required for a specific type of ballot damage (e.g., 'water-saturated', 'thermal-degraded') to prevent procedural errors.

damage_type.description: The type of damage identified in the batch details.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_stabilization
action_set_definitions.description: Applies the specified forensic stabilization procedure to a batch using a valid protocol code.

protocol_code.description: The code retrieved from the lookup_forensic_protocol tool.

action_set_definitions.name: submit_to_bab_adjudication
action_set_definitions.description: Submits a stabilized batch to the Bipartisan Adjudication Board (BAB) for final voter intent determination and manual count verification.

action_set_definitions.name: update_batch_tabulation
action_set_definitions.description: Synchronizes the official electronic record with the BAB-certified physical count, resolving the discrepancy for that specific batch.

certified_count.description: The final count determined by the BAB.

action_set_definitions.name: resolve_incident_status
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the global resolution_status to 'Resolved' for the specific incident.

state_description.batches: A collection of ballot batches, where keys are batch IDs and values contain original tallies, physical counts, and audit status.
state_description.audit_log: A historical sequence of all reconciliation actions taken and their outcomes.
state_description.total_discrepancy_count: The current numerical difference between the electronic tally and the physical verification across all batches.
state_description.resolution_status: The overall status of the audit (e.g., 'In Progress', 'Resolved', 'Disputed').

B-89-ALPHA.notes: Recovered from flood-damaged transit vehicle; ballots currently clumped and wet.

B-89-ALFA.notes: Resolved discrepancy from earlier shift; system record retained for audit history.

B-89-ALPHB.notes: VVPAT scrolls exposed to high heat in storage; requires infrared imaging.

B-98-ALPHA.notes: Precinct 98 batch with mechanical scanning errors; unrelated to water damage event.

B-89-A.notes: Placeholder entry created during database synchronization error.

audit_log.outcome: Detected multiple discrepancies in South District batches. Flagged for manual triage.
